views.text: While fundamental training principles are universal, material differences in joint structures and endocrine profiles lead to differentiated recommendations.

With Gym, we'll focus your plan on traditional progressive overload with a wide variety of exercises and equipment. With Home, we’ll focus on progressing leverages within different bodyweight variations and progressions. Note that you’ll be able to switch seamlessly between the two and allocate detailed equipment profiles.
